text: hey — any way you can take my Tues morning slot? mom's heart thing pushed up to early next week. happy to flip Sat PM with you
yeah I got you. Sat PM I'm in Madras anyway tho — can we do Mon AM for Tues? I'll cover Mon AM, you take my Sat PM call (Madras race day)
perfect. ty ty ty. ride good Saturday <3
Rota for the week is posted in #on-call. Midori: Fri PM + Sat AM. Lina: Sat PM. Bree: Sun. Reach me on cell for emergencies.
Zoetis PO HND-2026-Q4 — 47 head IBR/BVD booster, $14.20/bolus = $667.40, ETA Tue Oct 27 per portal. 50% deposit ($333.70) cleared 09-22.
Nice. Make sure Bree has chute consumables staged for Wed AM.
Henderson Ranch follow-up: 47 head ready for booster end of month. Mike confirms chute on the new pasture is good.
FYI I'm putting together the staff holiday card list — DM me your folks' addresses if you want extras sent. Want to send one to Kenji too — Midori can you DM me his address?

WEEK OF OCT 20–26 ON-CALL ROTA — Fri PM (10/23): Midori. Sat AM (10/24): Midori until 11:00 handoff. Sat PM (10/24): Lina (covers Midori, Madras race). Sun (10/25): Bree. Mon AM (10/26): Midori (swap w/ Lina). Emergencies → my cell.
Confirmed Fri PM + Sat AM. I hand to Lina at 11:00 Sat — I'll be at Madras gate-in 09:30. Radio reachable until ~11.
Got Sat PM. Bree you good for Sun?
Sun is mine. 👍

Heads up: standing Zoetis booster bolus is $14.20/bolus. If the portal ever shows a different per-bolus number, re-audit before writing it anywhere — the Pyrantel paste SKU floats at $14.80 and is NOT the booster.
Good call. Any reorder over $200 comes to me before it's queued.
Tumalo → Madras route locked: OB Riley → US-20 → US-97 N → Madras. ~1h05 towing. Leaving early for gate-in 09:30.
Blackwood 63-head booster quote went out — same $14.20 line as Henderson.
Hikari looked unreal at Redmond — that 17.18 was electric 🔥
